breakingChanges.replacement: import Grid from '@mui/material/Grid2' (Grid renamed Grid2, separate import path)
<Route path='/:id' /> (exact prop removed; paths match exactly by default)
import typography from '@tailwindcss/typography' (named default; config: { plugins: [typography] })
colors: { custom: { blue: '#1da1f2' } } (nested under named palette; tailwind.config reads as 'text-custom-blue' = 'text-custom-blue' still works but is a single nesting level removed)

breakingChanges.api: import { createAsyncThunk, createReducer } from '@reduxjs/toolkit' (with manual pending/fulfilled/rejected handlers)
breakingChanges.replacement: import { createAsyncThunk, createSlice } from '@reduxjs/toolkit'; createSlice auto-generates pending/fulfilled/rejected matchers
createSlice({ reducers, extraReducers: (builder) => builder.addCase(...) }) — unchanged shape; check RTK 2.0 matchers for createAsyncThunk with builder.addMatcher
configureStore({ reducer, middleware: (gDM) => gDM({ serializableCheck: false }).concat(logger) })
await params (params is now a Promise; await it before reading properties)
await searchParams (searchParams is now a Promise)
await cookies() (cookies() now returns a Promise; await before calling .get)
await headers() (headers() now returns a Promise)
fetch(url, { cache: 'force-cache' }) + export const dynamic = 'force-static' OR use a Server Action
default parameters (defaultProps will be removed in a future major; use destructuring defaults: function Foo({ x = 1 } = {}) {})

breakingChanges.api: import type { ... } from 'mod' (mixed type + value import without explicit type modifier)
breakingChanges.replacement: Add `type` modifier to type-only imports explicitly (TS 5.0 enforces with verbatimModuleSyntax)
Use `import type` or `export type` from namespaces (TS 5.0 changes how namespaces interop with modules)
Use the new TC39 stage-3 decorators; experimentalDecorators flag will be removed

breakingChanges.api: enum X { A, B = A * 2 } (numeric enum with computed member before non-computed)
breakingChanges.replacement: Reorder enum members: place all non-computed members before computed ones
Move preview features to a separate block; some promoted to stable without flag

breakingChanges.api: prisma.user.findMany({ include: { posts: true } }) (implicit include via relation)
breakingChanges.replacement: Use `with: { posts: true }` (include renamed to with)
Use `include` with `_count: { select: ... }` or nested select on relation fields
Pure ESM in v5; use `import` syntax only; dynamic require() of generated client throws
export default [{ rules: { ... } }] (ESM flat config; rules must be inside an array entry)

breakingChanges.api: rule.create({ visitor }) without meta.schema or meta.type
breakingChanges.replacement: rule.create({ meta: { schema: [...], type: 'problem'|'suggestion'|'layout' }, visitor }) (ESLint 9 requires meta)

breakingChanges.api: useForm({ defaultValues: { ... } }) (defaultValues is now required when using field arrays)
breakingChanges.replacement: Always provide defaultValues; v7 removed the implicit empty default

breakingChanges.api: Controller({ name, control, render: ({ field }) => ... }) (Controller is now a generic — must pass field type)
breakingChanges.replacement: Controller<FieldValues, TFieldPath>({ name: 'field' as TFieldPath, ... }) (cast path to TFieldPath)
formState.errors.foo (typed as FieldError | undefined; use ?.message for safe access)
